falsification_logic.confirm_like: A positive live-cascade growth term improves the fit, and the live/frozen decomposition is qualitatively compatible with the probability-weighted prior.
falsification_logic.falsify_like: A constant-DM or effectively frozen history fits equally well, or the preferred live-growth proxy remains zero or wrong-sign.

notes: This is a compressed public full-shape/RSD proxy based on summary points rather than a perturbation-level chain analysis.
New in v7.3: the output decomposes the fit into live and frozen fractions rather than forcing every null into a simple yes/no verdict.
